entry.title: Re: Validation on template correctness for file upload in SAP MDG
entry.content: Thanks Anirban for the reply and information shared. I have one more question on validation, if we use mass consolidation process, at the time of check, will it check for each line item in the file for error and list down or errors will be consolidated with line item numbers? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Validation on template correctness for file upload in...
entry.content: Thanks Anirban for the reply and information shared. I have one more question on validation, if we use mass consolidation process, at the time of check, will it check for each line item in the file for error and list down or errors will be consolidated with line item numbers? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Free Browser Extension for SAP S/4HANA for Increased Productivity and Better User Experience
entry.content: Thanks @Robert_Jan_Bron

entry.title: Copy INVOICE Idoc field E1EDK01-KUNDEUINR into field BSEG-STWEG via Idoc FM
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need some help for updating the Idoc field E1EDK01-KUNDEUINR into the table field BSEG-STWEG via Idoc posting function module IDOC_INPUT_INVOIC_FI . I found a customer function 101 at line no 654 of include program LIEDIF4S which can be used but I am not sure how to populate the values into the table DOCUMENT_DATA of this customer function. These table values  will in turn be utilized by the BDC program for posting the FI document. Could anyone please provide any sample code which can be used for this purpose. We need to populate the BDC table correctly. I tried via debugging by adding a record into internal table DOCUMENT_DATA however the BDC is giving error. I searched the structure COBL but did not find any field for VAT reg no in this structure. FYI, I was following the steps mentioned in the below blog post: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/invoic-idoc-processing-of-intercompany-billing-iv/bc-p/13983721#M48956

Thanks in advance,

Rajeev

entry.title: BTP Onboarding服务介绍
entry.content:
BTP Onboarding 顾问是做什么的？

BTP Onboarding部门是伴随着SAP云转型诞生的，目前隶属SAP三大部门SAP Labs， SAP Customer Success，SAP Customer Service Delivery (CSD)中的CSD部门。云时代的订阅模式对于客户支持的周期有更高更细致的要求，之前我们了解到SAP Customer Success Manager (CSM)在任何一个云软件公司都具有不可替代的作用，从客户下单到客户上线，再到客户续约签单都需要CSM的参与。显然一个CSM在面对十几个客户的时候，根本无法对每个产品的细节和客户周期中遇到的所有问题全权把控，所以他们需要去协调SAP的内部资源，来提高客户的满意度，而SAP Onboarding部门即是在客户签约初期扮演重要角色。

举个例子，客户A购买了3年的SAP Rise合约，包括ERP Cloud私有云版本和SAP BTP业务技术平台上的集成服务，那么SAP Onboarding部门就会联系客户预约时间来完成ERP Cloud私有云版本的入门介绍，如何提交工单，如何管理S用户，如何注册后续网上研讨会等，此外对于BTP来说，会讲解什么是SAP BTP，如何登陆，什么是集成服务，如何进行集成服务的开通等等。这个过程可以由CSM来协调，如果没有CSM，也可以由销售，甚至直接由客户自己发起。

BTP Onboarding顾问，就是分散到每个产品线上的专家，用来讲解相关的服务，并带领客户开通，以及入门，保证按期交付云服务，并提高客户满意度。当然，在客户项目实施的过程中以及上线以后遇到的问题，会由CSM协调其他部门资源，比如SAP原厂实施顾问来继续跟进，BTP Onboarding顾问将不再追踪。

对于BTP而言，作为一个平台，上边服务众多，尤其是集成，数据相关的服务，内容深度和广度都不是简单一小时全部可以让客户掌握的，所以会细分成BTP Cockpit介绍，BTP 集成套件介绍，BTP 云上数仓Datasphere介绍，BTP Build介绍等等，每一个会花1到1个半小时的时间讲解。

具体详细信息可以参考Onboarding中心网站：

https://support.sap.com/en/product/onboarding-resource-center/business-technology-platform.html

该网站内容丰富，你还可以点击上级目录，查看所有产品的Onboarding资源，比如BTP数据与分析 。

在这个网站上，你可以

  • 查询过往产品讲解录屏
  • 注册即将到来的网上研讨会
  • 免费申请1:1的Onboarding讲解 （当然要已经购买了BTP相关产品才可以）

总之，对于BTP Onboarding服务而言，其宗旨就是为了带领客户入门，了解相关产品内容，并保证客户可以登陆相关服务进行后续开发和使用。

BTP Onboarding社区

更多相关信息，请翻阅BTP Onboarding的社区页面

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/customer-onboarding

entry.title: Re: Unable to fetch the data from MDF objects in custom workflow notifications.
entry.content: Hi , Did you manage to solve this issue, am having the same problem hey

entry.title: Re: Problem updating delivery date (EINDT) and statistica...
entry.content:
I've solved the problem !

The objective is to do the dates calculation at the first occurrence of each schedule in PROCESS_SCHEDULE, store the result in an internal global table inside the implementation class and if the check cycle is reprocessed again (TRANSPORT_MM~START), we read in this private table instead of doing the calculations again possibly with wrong data.

The other important point is to determined WHEN i have to refresh the global table because when the check cycle is completely done, the table must be cleared so when an another modification is done at screen, it doesn't read the table but does again the calculations.

I have investigated the standard and one attribute of class CL_PO_HEADER_HANDLE_MM was the perfect match => MY_ITERATION_COUNT but this attribute is private! I have extended CL_PO_HEADER_HANDLE_MM and created a GETTER method to retrieve this attribute. With this, i was able initialize my table when needed!

In the end, no matter how much times PROCESS_SCHEDULE was triggered, i was able to put back the values the customer wanted.

entry.title: Quality certificates issue with printing for different form templates
entry.content:
In output management two different CoA form templates were created and the changes were connected in CBC to appropriate output type.

In output parameter determination app on determination step for form template, the same change was made – forms were linked to Quality certificate output type. The changes were properly checked and activated.

During the creation of CoA in app Manage Quality Certificates for inspection lots there is no possibility to choose which form I print at the moment, system always choose the same form.

Please could anyone help if there is some step I have predicted or confirm if there is no possibility in system to carry the mentioned action.

 

Thanks!

Anita

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud sandbox system now available
entry.content:
Hi, 

My company is subscribing TDD (Test, Demo, Development) for S/4HANA public cloud edition. Currently, I am working of testing environment. I came across the idea of sandbox system. I want to know is there a sandbox system available for partner. If yes, how to activate it? Is it free? 
Thank you,

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements/RAP Table Control on Object Page freezes randomly
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based draft-enabled Fiori app with a table control rendered on the object page for the child entity. I'm facing a strange problem where the table control freezes randomly while scrolling or entering values in quick succession. There are no backend calls pending. So, its definitely the UI5 component. Everything works well again if I refresh the page. Interestingly, this happens in our QA system and not in Dev. The table control just goes into the loading state infinitely with the rest of the app being functional at the same time. I've no idea what's going on. No errors in the console or the network tab. Please suggest. We are on S/4HANA 2022

Regards,

Saurabh

If you're still facing issues with creating the communication arrangement/scenario, you might want to create an SAP incident for the same on component BC-SRV-APS-COM.
Please provide detailed information about what you did and where the issue appears.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Is there any way to skip an error on CVI Cockpit in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are executing CVI cockpit in S/4 HANA, then encounter some error of mismatch like some vendors and customers are not consolidated, because "name4" is not same as those vendors and customers.

My question is that is there any way to skip that error, then move to next step? Like those vendors and customers are remain unintegrated. I have an idea that archive and logical deletion, but it will take more time to do that, so skipping that error is desirable.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Creating Customer in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud via OData
entry.content:
Let's see how to create Business Partner as Customer in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud via HTTP adapter in SAP Cloud Integration.

SAP provides RESTful API (A2X), which is available at the Business Accelerator Hub.

From the environment of SAP Cloud Integration, we have actually two options - we can use OData adapter or HTTP adapter. When in decision about which one to choose, this blog can help you. I wanted to have more flexibility over the entire process and hence I will be describing the use of HTTP adapter. It requires more work, but provides you with higher level of control.

The structure of SAP S/4 APIs can be sometimes confusing, as it doesn't always follow a consistent logic. Sometimes you are referring to Business partner in the query, sometimes in the payload. Sometimes an object has its own API, sometimes you use an extension of another object's API. No worry, we will clarify this.

X-CSRF-TOKEN

The first obstacle you face using HTTP adapter is the handling of authentication against the SAP S/4. As creating a Business Partner is a POST operation, you need higher privileges then when using GET query. And that is why we need to get x-csrf-token first.

To achieve this, we need to set a request to this service:
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner
We run this request in Request-Reply component with HTTP adapter:

HTTP method I select HEAD, as we are not sending any content, neither we are asking for data. So to minimize the exchange overhead, I think HEAD is the most economic method for this kind of call.

The asterisks in Request Headers and Response Headers ensure that the headers will be exchanged and that we will receive all the headers we need.

You may be wondering why we are calling the /A_BusinessPartner service, when we want to get the token. The reason is that we should be calling the same service which we will call to actually create the Customer later.

Right before the Request-Reply component we need to place a Content Modifier with this header: x-csrf-token = Fetch

And one more thing - click anywhere in the canvas to enter the Integration Flow config, go to Runtime Configuration and set HTTP Session Reuse. This will assure that token is reused for any other subsequent call.

The iflow section which handles the token can look like this
After we run the iflow, the service will be called and we will receive the token and cookie in the response header. We don't need to extract them or handle them before calling the service to create Business Partner.

What we can do is to handle the http response. I chose a router, which routes the '200' response to positive scenario and any other response code to error handling subprocess. 

CREATE BUSINESS PARTNER

Now let's go to create the Business Partner entity, which we will extend later to Customer.

We will be again calling the service:
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner
Now we use the POST method, as we are sending data to SAP S/4. 
Place a Content Modifier before the Request-Reply with content-type = application/json, as seen at the screenshot above. Like this we are telling the server what format we are sending.
The body has to be in json and have following format and syntax. We can set up a Business Partner with such as simple payload as this:

 

{
"BusinessPartnerCategory": "1",
"FirstName": "John",
"LastName": "Smith"
}

 

BusinessPartnerCategory decides whether the Business Partner will be Person (1), Organization (2) or Group (3).
More sophisticated payload to create an Organization can look like this:

 

{
  "BusinessPartnerCategory": "2",
  "OrganizationBPName1": "ACME CORP",
  "CorrespondenceLanguage": "EN",
  "SearchTerm1": "ACME",
  "to_BusinessPartnerAddress": [
    {
      "to_MobilePhoneNumber": [
        {
          "PhoneNumber": "111222111"
        }
      ],
      "to_EmailAddress": [
        {
          "EmailAddress": "acme@email.com"
        }
      ],
      "StreetName": "Long Street",
      "HouseNumber": "25",
      "Country": "GB",
      "PostalCode": "11111",
      "CityName": "London",
      "Language": "EN"
    }
  ]
}

 

Notice that we are using 'to_' prefixes for object extensions to be able to create Business Partner with address, email and telephone number. When we run the POST query, SAP will provide us with an XML response, which carries information about the newly created Business Partner.
As we will need the Business Partner number further in our iflow, we can extract the number via this XPath statement in Content Modifier:
//*[local-name()='properties']/*[local-name()='BusinessPartner']

We extracted the Business Partner number into a Property.

ASSIGN CUSTOMER ROLES

To extend our Business Partner to Customer, we need to assign it customer roles. We do this via another API.

URL: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartnerRole
Method: POST
Headers: Content-type = application/json
Sample body:

 

{
      "BusinessPartner": "BP number of newly created Business partner",
      "BusinessPartnerRole": "FLCU00"
}

 

The same call we use to assign any other role (like FLCU01), just modify the value in body.

CREATE CUSTOMER IN SALES AREA

Now we need to set Sales area data for our Customer. 

URL: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer('BP number of newly created Business partner')/to_CustomerSalesArea
Method: POST
Headers: Content-type = application/json
Sample body (we are also setting a fixed Payer for demonstration):

 

{
  "SalesOrganization": "1000",
  "DistributionChannel": "01",
  "Division": "01",
  "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0001",
  "Currency": "USD",
  "to_PartnerFunction": {
    "results": [
      {
        "PartnerFunction": "PY",
        "BPCustomerNumber": "1000001"
      }
    ]
  }
}

 

CREATE CUSTOMER IN COMPANY CODE

And similarily for Company code data.

URL: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer('BP number of newly created Business partner')/to_CustomerCompany
Method: POST
Headers: Content-type = application/json
Sample body:

 

{
  "CompanyCode": "1000",
  "ReconciliationAccount": "10000000",
  "PaymentTerms": "0001"
}

 

Our Customer should now be all set for basic business operations.

Notice that SAP responds to our calls in XML format. If for some reason you need to convert it to JSON, use an XML to JSON converter component, or use header Accept = application/json in your query. By that you are telling SAP to provide response in JSON.

entry.title: Customization for SAP SuccessFactors Timesheet in Duration TRV
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are planning to implement SuccessFactors Timesheet, who already has Time Off operational in the Duration Time Recording Variant. They have some specific requirements as outlined below:

  • Custom Fields on Timesheet UI:

    • Include 'Start Time' and 'End Time' fields that automatically calculate total working hours and populate the 'Duration' field on the Timesheet UI.
  • Three types of breaks:
    • One fully unpaid.
    • One fully paid.
    • One with the first 15 minutes included in working hours and the remaining unpaid.
  • Mandatory Rest Periods: Enforce a minimum duration of rest between two shifts.
  • Overtime Tracking and TOIL Generation:
    • Track overtime during night hours (proposed to create as an Attendance Time Type for manual selection by employees).
    • Automatically generate TOIL based on recorded overtime hours.

While I understand these requirements are achievable with Time Tracking, we aim to implement Timesheet while maintaining the Duration-Based Time Recording Variant currently in use to avoid redeployment of Time Off and work schedules.

Could anyone share their expertise on whether these customizations are feasible within the Timesheet-Duration TRV setup? If so, could you provide guidance or suggestions on how to configure the same?

Thank you in advance for your insights!

Best regards,
Aesha

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Re: Paid Breaks in EC timesheet/Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hi Shilpa,
I've a similar requirement to be deployed. We are planning to implement SuccessFactors Timesheet, who already has Time Off operational in the Duration Time Recording Variant. They have a requirement to implement three types of breaks: One fully unpaid, One fully paid, One with the first 15 minutes included in working hours and the remaining unpaid. Could you please suggest if you've been able to achieve the requirement and if this shall work out with the Duration based Time Recording Variant as well?

entry.title: Re: Can the approval workflow process in ALM be integrate...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Please check this SAP Help Portal content Change Request Management Tasks in the My Inbox SAP Fiori App

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: SAC - Input control Date range - Setting ranges
entry.content:
Hello,

when i try to set an earlier date then the start date the selection for the end date is not possible.

I cant confirm the date and the calendar remains open.

I receive the error "The start date cannot be later than the end date.

 

Is there any way to fix this?

 

Kr

entry.title: Is it possible to use Maintain Standard Text app in Public cloud to determine Dynamic text in Forms
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to have certain texts like in So10 and to use those texts in a output form where the texts can also be altered in the future.

Is it possible to add texts in Maintain standard text app in SAP Public cloud and use them as dynamic texts in Adobe forms doe. will we be able to access these texts as a part of any CDS view or is there any BADI for the same? Kindly help if any alternative approach for this.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to export Data from Datasphere to MS S...
entry.content:
Hi @QT2 

As of now, MS SQL can be used only as source, not as target.

Regards,

Bheemesh

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
Hello @Andrea_Monty, this commenting feature is available in the What's New document itself, not the Viewer. So within the Viewer click on the What's New topic you are interested in, once there the "Comment" feature should be available on the right sidebar as long as you are logged in. 
I hope this helps.

Best, 

Diana

entry.title: Clarification on Restriction Rule of Sales Area in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
We are seeking clarification on the accessibility behavior of accounts, contacts, and leads based on Sales Data and Sales Area in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2.


  1. Scenario Details:


    • We aim to control user access to accounts, contacts, and leads but we dont find any doc emphasising how sales data or sales area could be setup for contact or lead and the behaivor for account. 
    • While it is understood that sales area data plays a critical role in defining access control, the exact behavior when integrating sales data or sales area profiles into user access remains unclear.

  2. Clarification Needed:


    • How does SAP Sales Cloud differentiate the role of Sales Data vs Sales Area when applied to profile setup for access control? The only thing we know is from sales data to add sales area data for one account but it seems no sense.
    • Can user access to accounts, contacts, and leads be strictly limited by sales area or sales data criteria, and if so, how can this be configured?
    • Is there any interplay or prioritization between sales area and sales data in determining access permissions?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Restriction Rule of Sales Area in SA...
entry.content:
For accounts, contacts, and leads, they all have the restriction rule: Sales Area.

Under Sales Area, we have 2 selections:

  • My Sales Data
  • Sales Areas of My Sales Orgs

 

Let's see what's the differences in Account for example.

My Sales Data:

Under Settings >> Employees, there is a tab called "Sales Data". Employees are always created with an assignment to an organizational unit. Therefore, you must create the necessary sales data required to use employees for various business needs within the org structure of your company.
You can use territories, distribution channels and divisions for the employee here. This is the sales data of the Employee.

Now, Employee A has Sales Organization E.

If you choose My Sales Data as Restriction rule for Employee A, this means that Employee A can access all the Accounts which are of Sales Organization E.

The Account's sales data could be checked under Sales Data tab in the Account entity.



Sales Areas of My Sales Orgs

Under Settings >> Organization Unit (Open the Employee assigned Org), there is a tab called "Sales Data Restriction". Here you could restrict the Sales Data of the Org.

Now, Employee A belongs to Org B. Org B has Sales Data Restriction to Distribution Channel C & Division D.

If you choose Sales Areas of My Sales Orgs as Restriction rule for Employee A, this means that Employee A can access all the Accounts which has the same sales data as Distribution Channel C & Division D.

entry.title: Re: Impact of Enforcing SSO on Inviting External User in...
entry.content:
Good day Maximilliantsi,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry within our SAP Community.  In response to your inquiry, if you activate enforce SSO, it means the manual login is enforced to all users but API (where manual login is needed for scripts). Our experience: Companies, who need to enforce SSO, having external partners at the same time creating them accounts in their SSO, and give them access to diagrams they need.

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Character length issue in PM - General Maintenance Task List template- Field PLNNR
entry.content:
How to resolve the issue where the 'Key for Task List Group' field in the 'Task List Header' sheet of the 'Source Data for PM - General Maintenance Task List Template' is only accepting up to 8 characters, even though it is specified to allow up to 80 characters?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Character length issue in PM - General Maintenance Ta...
entry.content:
Fields in the migration template are always representing the source data. Source data can be longer than SAP standard data esp. if the source system is not an SAP system. The field length is set to 80 characters for most of that fields to represent also non-SAP source data systems.

The different field length is not a problem but a correct behavior during data migration to SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition systems by using the content migration in Migration Cockpit.
Because the template is always the view on the legacy source data structures a customer may have.
Therefore customers can have longer field lengths for their legacy fields than the defined SAP target field lengths. A value mapping will convert the value from legacy source to the SAP target value.

entry.title: Re: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment i...
entry.content: Trial Integration in region US-East is facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: Wrong Deviation Calculation for KPI/DataPoint
entry.content:
I guess I found the problem. The calculation of the deviation happens in the Frontend in sap.ovp.cards.Annotation-Helper.js. The following line was added in this function: 

function returnPercentageChange(iKpiValue, iTargetValue) {
   //...
   if (typeof iKpiValue == "string") {
      iKpiValue = NumberFormat.getIntegerInstance().parse(iKpiValue);
   }
   //...
}

 Since the KPI and Target values are retreived from the backend, they are read from the JSON response and will always be of type "string". Regardless of the actual type of the KPI, this code will always convert it to an integer. This causes two problems: 

  1. Fractional digits will be lost
  2. With german language settings, values like "65.123" will be converted to 65123 instead of 65.123

The combination of these two problems will cause the weird deviation values. 
I do not know why this line was added by SAP and why an Integer Conversion is used. Unlike the KPI value, the Target value is just converted to decimal using an implicit conversion...

entry.title: Re: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment i...
entry.content: Trial integration region us-east is facing the same issue. The flows cannot be deployed

entry.title: Navigating SAP BTP with the SAP BTP Guidance Framework (Live Series)
entry.content:
We're very excited to kick-off 2025 with a dedicated series to bring you closer to the SAP BTP Guidance Framework.

In each of the 3 episodes, our experts will share why the SAP BTP Guidance Framework is the only link you’ll need for any and all SAP BTP projects. Whether you are an architect, developer or administrator, the SAP BTP Guidance Framework provides dedicated information about all the relevant tools and assets in one place, outlining a clear, structured approach to help you continuously innovate with SAP BTP. 

Each live session targets a specific persona, but for a comprehensive overview, we highly recommend attending all 3 sessions.

And don't be shy! Our experts love engaging with our community and answering your questions.

Episode 1: Paving the way for architects to shine with SAP BTP 

In episode 1, we’ll focus on architects.  

As an SAP BTP architect, there are different tools and assets available to support you in your role. Do you know them all? Do you even know where to start? Probably not. That’s exactly where the SAP BTP Guidance Framework comes in. From decision guides and methodologies to SAP BTP reference architectures, we’ve compiled all the must-have information in one place. This makes it easier for you to find what you need, understand why you need it and successfully accomplish your tasks. You can best use the guiding assets of SAP BTP Guidance Framework together with SAP LeanIX enterprise architecture management solutions which allow you to plan, govern, and track the modernization of your IT landscape according to best practices from SAP. 

Hint: this session will also include a brief overview of the SAP BTP Guidance Framework. If you are completely new to the concept, even if you are not an architect, I highly recommend attending this first session.

😎  Meet our experts: @KatrinVonAhsen and @Rene_de_Daniel 

➡️  Register here 

📺  Watch live on YouTube.

Episode 2: Paving the way for developers to innovate with SAP BTP

This session will focus on developers and how they can benefit from the SAP BTP Guidance Framework. 

Developers have many tasks and interact with various puzzle pieces as they navigate through the ins and outs of their development projects. Without a clear understanding of what is available, then it could get messy and complicated very quickly. But worry not, the SAP BTP Guidance Framework is the answer to it all. It’s the single source of truth for all relevant SAP BTP assets and sources of information that you’ll need to successfully complete your development tasks. 

Our expert will share how and why we compiled these assets and dive further into the SAP BTP Developer's Guide and SAP Build. Both essential for kicking off any and all development projects on SAP BTP.

😎  Meet our expert: @srivatsansundar1 

➡️  Register here

📺  Watch live on YouTube

Episode 3: Paving the way for administrators to operate efficiently with SAP BTP

With episode 3, we’ll turn our focus to the unsung heroes of day-to-day operations – the administrators.

Administrators need to deal with several different tasks that span from onboarding to SAP BTP, to running and operating applications as smoothly as possible on the platform. This includes concepts like account structuring, deployment and observability and understanding how to use OpenTelemetry@SAP through SAP Cloud ALM for operations.

But administrators are also responsible for enabling their teams to efficiently use SAP BTP. For example, by enabling agile development on SAP BTP and ensuring the right level of control.  

And last but not least, it’s important to understand how SAP supports administrators with tools, best practices and guidance. For instance, by reducing manual efforts around account provisioning and operating applications, and by integrating SAP BTP operation processes into a central operations platform like SAP Cloud ALM. 

Our experts will share how all this and more is covered in the SAP BTP Guidance Framework with assets like the SAP BTP Administrator Guide and the new SAP learning journey “Administrating SAP Business Technology Platform”. 

😎  Meet our experts: @BorisZarske, @stephaniejerch and @NiklasSiemer  

➡️  Register here 

📺  Watch live on YouTube.

💥  Will you be attending? Do you already have questions for our experts? Let us know in the comments! 💥

entry.title: Re: Windows Username automatically populating sapshcut.exe
entry.content:
Hi Lucas,

This has fixed my issue - Many thanks!

entry.title: More than one validity area in import file
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to load more than one Validity Area and Rating. But it gives back errors with the following options, maybe you have an idea.

For the load of just one Validity Area and Rating into Usage, I tried the following (and it worked):

Usage
U:VACLID,RVLID
STRING.EXTERM<";">
PUBLIC;REG_WORLD

I tried that as well, but I was unsuccessful

Usage
U:VACLID,RVLID
STRING.LIST<",">
PUBLIC;CA,PUBLIC;US

Hopefully, one of you has a solution.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0 – Additional Onboarding Data Collection UI Configurations
entry.content:
Hi @ivettemmatoth 

I think you should put the HTML code in the Init rule, not in the UI, because you can't save it that way. - Do you have a sample screenshot of how it looks when you use HTML code in oninit rule? Please share your inputs.

@smitajalit @Gopinath - Appreciate if you can share your thoughts to setup this requirement.

entry.title: SAP DM - Creation of a Custom Unit of Measure
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have just created a new unit of measure in SAP Digital Manufacturing called "HCN" using the API POSTuom/v1/uoms, assigning to the field dimension the value "TIME", in order to be able to use my new unit of measure in the definition of the Operation Activities duration during the Order creation, instead of hour or seconds.

The system correctly created the new unit of measure, but I am not able to see it together with the other UoM related to the "TIME" dimension.
I tried also to create a Production Order via API using the custom UoM in the "schedule" section (the section in which you can define the duration of the routing operations) and the order is correctly created but i see the values of the field "Processing Time" of the different Operation Activities in the section "Order Schedule" of the Production Order in Seconds and not in HCN.

Do you have any ideas regarding this topic?

Thanks,
Yuri

entry.title: Re: EWM Physical inventory - list of differences before p...
entry.content:
Hello Dim,

checkout the usage of tolerance functionality/groups in EWM, which can be used during the count or afterwards while posting the difference.

Check out the following blog entry for further information.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/how-to-define-physical-inventory-tolerance-group-in-embedded-ewm-in-s-4/ba-p/13433320 

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content:
@Riyaz_abdul I was able to reproduce the issue and have informed the team to investigate further.

It appears to be caused by a missing title value in an object cell, which prevents the image in the Avatar from being handled properly on Android. However, I don’t see any issues on iOS.

entry.title: Re: Resulttype of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[...
entry.content: AFAIK sfiom_s_repl_req_org_ass_extnd is an internal table of line structure sfiom_s_repl_req_org_ass_extnd. Compare in your system this structure definition with the one defined in your code, then adapt your definition and/or your code.

entry.title: Re: S/4 SOM Subscription Order - Pricing determination an...
entry.content:
The PRC_TRACE user parameter enables the price TRACE button in the CRM WEB UI. 

For fiori/backend no such parameter or other way is available to enable/analyze the price condition determination trace log.

Hope this answers your question.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not sh...
entry.content:
You wrote

  • Previous times the Material Group was shown in the column (define 'previous time'?) 
  • There is no value in ACDOCA for the field

Look for relevant notes such as (filter with your version)

  • 3105910 - Maintenance Order, Actual Costs: Product group not saved for Direct Procurement 
  • 3109613 - ABAP Report to enrich data records in ACDOCA with Plant Maintenance data

PS: Do you use account based CO-PA (or margin analysis)

  • in this case if MATKL maintained as a characteristic, then CO-PA will copy it to ACDOCA.

entry.title: Re: Sending vendor details through IDOC
entry.content:
Hello Expert

I am sending vendor master via BD14 , but how to send vendor master for specific purchase organisation on daily basis via BD14.

Any idea.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unable to Display Program Content in SAPGUI 7.70 rev8
entry.content:
Looking closer at the screen, one can see that the expected content is covered by a rectangle with some monospaced text and a line below. Latter is the result of a WRITE statement on the same screen the controls are intended to be shown.

This is caused by problematic programming as described in SAP note 3076834, part 2.

The same screen does not work in SAP GUI for Html either and is more or less working in SAP GUI for Windows coincidentally because the objects are stacked in a different order.

Please file a support message on component CA-MDG-ANR referencing above note.

Btw, please install the latest SAP GUI for Java version, which currently is 8.10 rev 1. SAP GUI for Java 7.70 is out of support since March 23 and 7.80 will be end of March 25.

entry.title: Re: sap system allowing lock same object in multiple Transport
entry.content: I see you have posted two screenshots of version management of an object with different transport requests as sources for the version. How is that related to Solution Manager? Could you please elaborate further?

Thanks

Massimo

entry.title: Re: writing approval condition
entry.content: Hi, I tried the query. It sends the A/P invoice without a base document for approval, but it also sends an A/P invoice that I opened with the copy target from a purchase order for approval. So, it's not working exactly as intended. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in...
entry.content:
Hi Rah,

Here is a query that should give you the expected result:

select L1.[GroupMask]
      ,(CASE L1.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
	   ,L1.AcctCode AS [Main account]
	   ,L1.AcctName AS [Main account name]
	   ,L2.AcctCode AS [Sub account]
	   ,L2.AcctName AS [Sub account name]
	   ,L3.AcctCode AS [Detailed account]
	   ,L3.AcctName AS [Detailed account name]
from (SELECT * FROM OACT WHERE Levels = '3') L3
     LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM OACT WHERE Levels = '2') L2 ON L3.FatherNum = L2.AcctCode
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM OACT WHERE Levels = '1') L1 ON L2.FatherNum = L1.AcctCode
order by 1, 3, 5, 7

Please note that I have assumed a maximum of 3 levels, based on your screenshot and exppected result text file. If you need more levels, you can add those by editing the SELECT and FROM clauses. I have given the tables aliases according to the level. I.e. L3 is level 3 accounts, L2 is level 2 accounts, etc.
If you want more levels, in the FROM clause, just start with the lowest level, and add subsequently higher levels in order from lowest to highest. In the SELECT clause you add the account codes and names from highest to lowest.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in...
entry.content: N.B. the GROUP column has hard-coded names, with 7 groups. Your Chart of Accounts may have more or less groups, and the names of these groups in the query may not correspond with the ones in your B1 system..

entry.title: Re: Is there a "Delete Certificate Template" Workflow?
entry.content: We are now in 2025, and still no possibility to remove unused certification templates (see https://me.sap.com/notes/2497583/E, dated Jan. 2023, still open). In addition, it is not planned to get developed, stopped in Jan. 21 (https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/212668/?section=sectionDetails)

entry.title: AirByte connector for SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:

#airbyte #SuccessFactors #connectors

entry.title: How to find out all assets have been depreciated as per their respective depreciation keys.
In RAP, Issue with BAPI Warning Message Handling in Unmanaged Save
entry.content:
I am working on an application in RAP, where I am using a managed scenario with an unmanaged save. In the save_modified method, I am calling a BAPI. The issue I am encountering is that the BAPI returns a warning, along with success and other informational messages. However, when the pop-up appears, it only shows the warning message.

When I click "Create," the process runs again, and on the second attempt, it displays all the messages together. This behavior is frustrating because the VBELN (sales document number) is generated twice. I am unsure if this is a bug or if there is an issue with the code.

I have attached both screenshots for your reference. Any guidance or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: executeHttpRequest returns: "Failed to load destinati...
entry.content:
You need a destination service instance binding to fetch the destination data from the BTP cockpit.

please check if you have the destination service and xsuaa service instance binding.

entry.title: Re: RISE sooner than later - Part 2
entry.content: Yes, I agree. They could run hand-in-hand, so strategy becomes part of the loop, at least to check alignment. One-pagers, such as the Business Footprint Diagram, could help here as an easy way to sketch this out, especially where the EA maturity is low. In my experience, that's one way to elegantly present the elevator pitch for EA without muddying the pragmatic approach you rightly identify.

entry.title: Re: Spark Innovation & Connection: SAP for Energy & Utilities Conference 2025
entry.content:
Hi Carla,
Thank you for your inquiry. The event is designed to be beneficial not only for IT staff but also for business people and decision-makers. It covers a wide range of topics that are relevant to various stakeholders in an organization.

Feel free to invite colleagues from different departments, including executives, managers, and team leads, as they can gain insights on how to align innovation & technology with business goals and improve overall organizational efficiency. If your client has any specific areas of interest, please let us know, and we can provide more tailored information.

Regards,

Sagnik.

entry.title: split cost / an item

Hello,

Could you please explain how users in the LMS can split the cost per person for an item?

We would like to add an cost formula to distribute the training cost among multiple participants.

entry.title: SuccessFactors AI - AI-assisted writing and writing - translation (Set up and hints)
entry.content:
AI Assisted writing is one of our AI Scenarios that we can find for several SuccessFactors Modules.

The effort to implement it is very low.

 

Employees can use the AI-assisted writing tool to enhance the quality of the content they write in the text fields in SAP SuccessFactors applications. AI-assisted writing is an interactive tool that uses generative AI capabilities to assist employees with their writing tasks.

For written text, the user can select translation options to choose the target language they'd like it translated to. With this action, the following capabilities are supported: one-directional translation from US English to all 46 languages supported in SAP SuccessFactors and bi-directional translation, which allows for full translation between US English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese.

 

 

To get the writing assistant and the translation tool activated some small steps are needed.

1. Fullfill the pre-requisites: you have to have licenses for AI Units

2. Activate the function

With the AI Units you will find a new admin page in SuccessFactors where you can activate AI Scenarios (AI Service Administration). Grant the permissions to this page to your user to manage the AI Scenarios.

 

 

In this application (AI Service Administration) you have to activate Assisted Writing with Text Analyzer. With this setting you have activated the a set of functionality for assisted writing. To allow you users to use the text analyzer and the translation please also activate this 2 option.

 

2. Assign permissions to your users

To make sure users can use the function add the scenarios to the relevant permission roles.

With activation of AI functions we have a new RBP category available under user permissions -> AI Access

Select the "Assisted writing with Text Analyzer" permissions.

 

DONE 😉

 

Result:

Your users can now find the tool on several places in SuccessFactors.


Where ever the tool is available users can see this by clicking to the text.

A new navigation will pop up where you can decide what action you want to do.

 

Options we have:

Enhance writing helps the users to create better texts and wordings:

Change the tone (make it more professional, personal, actionable) will help the user to formulate the wordings based on different business needs.

 

Analyze text analyzes the given text in regards to discrimination, bias etc.. It will show a proposal on how to change the description.

 

Translate helps your users to write the text in there preferred languages and let it translate to the needed language. With this action, the following capabilities are supported: one-directional translation from US English to all 46 languages supported in SAP SuccessFactors and bi-directional translation, which allows for full translation between US English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese.

entry.title: Retraining Assignments / Self registration
entry.content:
Hello, 

Actually we open some classes to the self registration. But we decided recently to add the retraining assignements but know everyone have access to the classes before the years of the assignements? We would like blok the acccess the years before the assignements ?

entry.title: Re: Uploading Images Into Hana Table With OData Service
entry.content: useless

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Signavio to improve AI usage?
entry.content:
Hi Christine, 

thank you for your feedback. Process Intelligence uses event logs from the transactional systems. We can only analized what is happening there and present in the database. KYP.ai is looking on the frontend side (Task Mining / Productivity Mining) and can capture additional insights like switching between applications, idle time, etc. This is often more relevant for (Gen) AI opportunities compared to processes happening in the backend systems. Feel free to reach out for further details. 

Best regards
Manuel

entry.title: How to fetch data from MDF for Document Generation where there are overlapping dates?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to store contract details and generate a letter contract. Some people can hold multiple contracts at the same time. 
Example below contracts for the same employee:

Contract 1
Start Date: 1-Jan-2025
End Date: 31-Mar-2025
Role: Teacher - Science
Rate per day: $50

Contract 2
Start Date: 1-Feb-2025
End Date: 30-Jun-2025
Role: Teacher - Math
Rate per day: $65

If we were to use Document Generation, how are we able to selectively only generate the 2nd contract since the dates are overlapping and Document Generation allows selection by As Of Date, which will select both records, instead of Contract 2?

entry.title: Re: Customer Specific Price List API Example
entry.content:
Hello Mark, 

here a sample payload on how to create a Customer Specific Price List vie the web service (ABC represents the Account ID and P111111 represents the Product ID):

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global" xmlns:a00="http://sap.com/xi/AP/CustomerExtension/BYD/A0014">
<soap:Header/>
<soap:Body>
<glob:SalesPriceListBundleMaintainRequest_sync>
<BasicMessageHeader/>
<SalesPriceList ActionCode="04">
<TypeCode>7PL0</TypeCode>
<ID>Test CSPL</ID>
<Description languageCode="EN">Customer Specific Price List</Description>
<StartDate>2025-01-01</StartDate>
<EndDate>2025-12-31</EndDate>
<AccountID>ABC</AccountID>
<CurrencyCode>EUR</CurrencyCode>
<PriceSpecification>
<TypeCode>7PR1</TypeCode>
<Amount currencyCode="EUR">200.00</Amount>
<BaseQuantity unitCode="EA">1</BaseQuantity>
<BaseQuantityTypeCode>EA</BaseQuantityTypeCode>
<ProductID>P111111</ProductID>
<ProductTypeCode>1</ProductTypeCode>
</PriceSpecification>
</SalesPriceList>
</glob:SalesPriceListBundleMaintainRequest_sync>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

 

with kind regards, 

Kathrin

entry.title: SAC Percentage calculation on P&L accounts, depending from account position
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I have a Fact table of P&L values with account codes and balance, and a public dimension account model containing the structure of a P&L (with hierarchy and some formula for some labels), and then I created a table dashboard that shows the P&L structure with the balance of each account.

This is an extract of the table

An example of formula label in the public dimension account model is:

“Gross profit Retailers” = “A1 – Revenues Retailers” + “B1.1 – COGS Retailers” + “B1.2 – Incentive/Commissions Retailers”

 

The achieve of my request is to calculate the % of each account depending of the position of accounts

 

Upper part of P&L

In the table, I need to calculate the % for each account divided by Revenue for each type

Example Type = Retailers

For each account I need to calculate % referring to “A1 – Revenues Retailers” value, as example 

Account 3000 = (57.10 / 14909.90) * 100 = 0.38%

Account 4200 = (-4380.28 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.37%

The account “B1.1 – COGS Retailers” value is calculated automatically by SAC (because is the father of some accounts), and I should show the % calculated as (-4389.99 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.44%

For account “Gross profit Retailers”, it should be (10456.85 / 14909.90) * 100 = 70.13%

 

The same logic should be applied to other type Private , Distributors and IC, but it should be changed the Revenue value, that is respectively "A2 – Revenues Privates” , "A3 – Revenues Distributors ”, "A4 – Revenues IC”

 

Central part of P&L

For account “Total COGS”, it should be “Total COGS” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (-4389.99 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.44%

For account “Total Incentive/commissions”, it should be “Total Incentive/commissions” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (-63.05 / 14909.90) * 100 = -0.42%

For account “Total Gross profit”, it should be “Total Gross profit” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (10456.85 / 14909.90) * 100 = 70.13%

 

Below part of P&L

For account below “Total Gross profit”, the % of each account should be calculated referring to “Total Revenues”

Example

% C = (79.70 / 14909.90) * 100 = 0.53%

% D = (-412.86 / 14909.90) * 100 = -2.76%

% E = (-1311.34 / 14909.90) * 100 = -8.79%

Inside each category C, D, E etc, are presents various accounts and for each one, the % should be calculated over same account, that is “Total Revenues”

I hope this explaination is quite clear.

Any ideas or solution is appreciated

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements/RAP Table Control on Object Page freezes randomly
entry.content:
Apparently, there's difference in the UI5 versions of our Dev and QA servers. Dev is on a higher version. That should explain the difference. Will update this thread if we are able to sort this out by upgrading the UI5 version on the other systems.

Dev:

QA:

entry.title: The same Standard Report is throwing Syntax error in one Server and is active in another Server
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

There is this standard report '/OPT/SAPLVIM_FG10A1' which is currently active in the Dev System-1 and in another Dev System-2, the same report is throwing Syntax error. Our Project uses two Dev Systems. When running a Tcode associated with this Standard Program, the Dev System-2 tis throwing dump because this Report is not active and is throwing syntax error when trying to activate. But,in  Dev system-2, there is no syntax error and the Tcode is running fine without any Dumps. 

No enhancements done in any of the Systems

I am not sure why this is happening and how can the same standard throw syntax error in one system and no errors in another system ?

 

Help Greatly appreciated.

 

Regards.

entry.title: IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT in <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1"> tag withi
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we have recently migrated to PO from PI 7.4.

In a scenario of FILE to IDOC i am facing below error

""Error before sending due to IDoc parsing error: (7) IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT in <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1"> tag within IDoc-XML for type <ZVESPRO>:
state=READING_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE, charPosition=98, lineNumber=1, columnNumber=99 ""

 

After my research , I found that SEGMENT field has to be mapped with Constant 1.

I have a question here , In 7.4 Idoc, Segment is mapped to constant "Null"(Blank parameter). and it working fine in production.

Now when coming to 7.5 , while we are trying to push the file , we are facing the error "IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT".

IS it mandate to map segment to constant 1 in 7.5 PO ?

Can someone please help me on this. Would be very helpful.

entry.title: Access $user.attr in a CDS projection
entry.content:
Hello CAP experts,

I have a list of attributes coming from our IDP. Now I wanna like limit the list of overall "LDAPGroups" to the one's the user has.

 

@readonly
    entity LDAPGroups as
        projection on app.LDAPGroups
        where ldapDn IN ($user.LDAPGroups);
 
The thing is  that the compiler complains:
 
Error: No value found for variable “$user.LDAPGroups”. Use option ‘variableReplacements’ to specify a value for “$user.LDAPGroups”
 
I tried to use the 
 
session_context('$user.LDAPGroups')
 
in various combinations... but no luck with it. Anybody an idea how I can solve this?

entry.title: Re: Impact of Enforcing SSO on Inviting External User in...
entry.content: Agree. Once you activate SSO for internal users externals can still use login using name and password.

entry.title: Did not receive activation e-mail for new S-user ID
entry.content:
Hello. We previously created the S-number  . However it seems that no email has been sent to activate the account. We've also tried the "forgot my password" option.

Can you resend the activation email for us again ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Did not receive activation e-mail for new S-user ID
entry.content: According to KBA2490845 - New S-user ID did not receive a Welcome e-mail to set their password - SAP for Me - SAP for Me, If the newly created S-User does not receive activation e-mail , please have the user contact SAP ID Service directly by sending an e-mail to sso@sap.com and they will work directly with the S-user to set the password.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Shaik Azmathulla - January 2025 Edition
entry.content: Well deserved Author Spotlight, @ShaikAzmathulla 👏🏻

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process governance integration with Shar...
entry.content: Hi, we will be launching SharePoint upload document as a standard integration in teh workflow on 04.02.2025. Hope this helps. Move nd delete objects will be launched later this year.

entry.title: Re: SAP User Experience Update: What’s New for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasReiss, 

The system information bar configuration is a cool thing with main/secondary text and color options. The thing is that the config is managed with transports. In 3tier system landscape I would like to have this only in QA and DEV system - not in PROD system. So, I maintain it in DEV, save the config to transport, transport it to QA but not to PROD. In cases where I'd like to have different colors for DEV: do the same but don't transport. And in case of system copies I start again... So it would have been awesome if there is a specific maintenance option per system and not tied to transport. Are there any plans to provide a better handling or did I miss anything? Thanks.

entry.title: How to publish an on-premise CDS View as a fiori tile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have an on-premise cds report created in eclipse that has already been registered as a service under transaction code /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and I am able to view the cds view as a fiori preview application. I would like to know is there a detailed guide on how to publish an on-premise CDS view as a fiori tile?

entry.title: Re: The same Standard Report is throwing Syntax error in one Server and is active in another Server
entry.content: You should first analyze the syntax error, it could be triggered by some other objects, such as ddic structures with different versions or missing in this system.

entry.title: Re: Is there a short to develop a "Publish button" in SAC...
entry.content: Hi Murllimaraati,
